Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.period.impl

Class WeightedWaveletZTransformWithFrequencyRangePlugin

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.period.PeriodAnalysisPluginBase
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.period.impl.WeightedWaveletZTransformPluginBase
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.period.impl.WeightedWaveletZTransformWithFrequencyRangePlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlugin
public class WeightedWaveletZTransformWithFrequencyRangePlugin extends WeightedWaveletZTransformPluginBase
Weighted Wavelet Z Transform (frequency range) plugin.

  • Method Details

    • executeAlgorithm

      public void executeAlgorithm(List<ValidObservation> obs) throws AlgorithmError, CancellationException
      Description copied from class: PeriodAnalysisPluginBase
      Execute a period analysis algorithm instance for this plugin to be applied to the specified observations.
      Specified by:
      executeAlgorithm in class PeriodAnalysisPluginBase
      Parameters:
      obs - The observations on which to perform the period analysis.
      Throws:
      AlgorithmError - if an error occurs during period analysis.
      CancellationException - if the operation is cancelled.
      See Also:
      • PeriodAnalysisPluginBase.executeAlgorithm(java.util.List)

    • newStarAction

      protected void newStarAction(NewStarMessage message)
      Description copied from class: PeriodAnalysisPluginBase
      When a new dataset is loaded, previous computation results and GUI components should be discarded, so the plugin will listen for such messages.
      Specified by:
      newStarAction in class PeriodAnalysisPluginBase
      Parameters:
      message - The new star message.
